meta.title: Vizoguard — AI Security & VPN
meta.description: Vizoguard: AI threat detection + encrypted VPN. Block phishing, malware and trackers in real time. $24.99/yr Basic or $99.99/yr Pro. Mac, Windows, iOS, Android.

hero.title: AI security. Private VPN. One app.
hero.subtitle: Blocks threats before they load. Encrypts everything you send. Mac, Windows, iOS, Android.

features.heading: Features
features.threat_desc: Stops malicious URLs before your browser loads them.
features.phishing_desc: Works on brand-new domains. No signature updates needed.
features.vpn_desc: All traffic encrypted. No logs. No tracking.
features.monitor_desc: See every app talking to the internet in real time.
features.heal_desc: Restores itself automatically if tampered with.
features.platform_desc: Desktop: full security app. Mobile: encrypted VPN.

pricing.heading: Pick your plan.
pricing.subheading: Launch discount — limited time. Cancel anytime.
pricing.basic_desc: Encrypted VPN. No logs. All platforms.
pricing.pro_desc: AI security + VPN. Blocks threats before they load.

steps.heading: Three steps. Sixty seconds.
steps.s1_desc: Pick your plan. Your license key arrives instantly by email.
steps.s2_desc: Download the app and enter your license key.
steps.s3_desc: Vizoguard runs in the background. You just browse.

faq.heading: FAQ
faq.q1: What's the difference between Basic and Pro?
faq.a1: Basic ($24.99/yr) is an encrypted VPN with 100 GB/month on all platforms via the Outline app. Pro ($99.99/yr) adds AI threat blocking, phishing detection, connection monitoring, and a self-healing immune system via the Vizoguard desktop app — plus VPN.
faq.a2: After subscribing, tap "Connect with Outline" on the thank-you page. The Outline app opens and imports your VPN automatically. No copy-paste needed. Pro users also get VPN built into the Vizoguard desktop app.
faq.a3: Basic: Use your VPN on any device via the Outline app (100 GB/month shared). Pro: One license binds to one device on first activation. Contact support@vizoguard.com to transfer.
faq.a4: Anytime. Protection continues until the end of your paid period. Cancel from Stripe or email support.
faq.a5: VPN: Mac, Windows, iOS, Android, Linux, ChromeOS. Security app: macOS 12+ and Windows 10/11.
faq.a6: Security features work offline with cached threat data. License checks every 24 hours with a 7-day grace period. VPN requires internet.
faq.a7: Vizoguard is an AI-powered security suite by PRIME360 HOLDING LTD (Malta) that blocks phishing, malware, and trackers in real time, plus includes an encrypted VPN with 100 GB/month. Available on Mac, Windows, iOS, and Android from $24.99/year.
faq.a8: Yes. Vizoguard enforces a strict zero-logging policy, uses AI-powered threat detection, and offers a 30-day money-back guarantee. Built by PRIME360 HOLDING LTD in Malta. Rated 4.9/5 by users.
faq.a9: Vizoguard Basic (encrypted VPN) is $24.99/year (regular $49.99) and Vizoguard Pro (AI security + VPN) is $99.99/year (regular $149.99). Both plans include a 30-day money-back guarantee and accept all major credit cards via Stripe.
faq.q10: Does Vizoguard offer a free trial?
faq.a10: Vizoguard does not offer a free trial, but both plans come with a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you are not satisfied, you can cancel and receive a full refund within 30 days, no questions asked.
faq.a11: Yes. Vizoguard Pro uses AI-powered phishing detection that works on brand-new domains — no signature updates needed. It blocks malicious URLs before your browser loads them, protecting you from phishing, credential theft, and fake login pages.
faq.a12: Vizoguard is not a traditional antivirus. It is an AI security suite that blocks threats at the network level — phishing sites, malware downloads, and trackers — before they reach your device. Combined with an encrypted VPN, it provides comprehensive online protection.
faq.q13: Is Vizoguard better than a regular VPN?
faq.a13: Regular VPNs only encrypt your traffic. Vizoguard Pro adds AI threat detection, phishing blocking, connection monitoring, and self-healing protection on top of the encrypted VPN. The Basic plan is a standard VPN at $24.99/year; Pro at $99.99/year adds the full security suite.
faq.q14: Which countries does Vizoguard VPN work in?
faq.a14: Vizoguard VPN works worldwide. It uses the Shadowsocks protocol which is designed to bypass network restrictions. Available on Mac, Windows, iOS, Android, Linux, and ChromeOS.
faq.a15: Yes. Vizoguard is available at a limited launch discount. Basic is $24.99/year (regular $49.99 — 50% off) and Pro is $99.99/year (regular $149.99 — 33% off). All plans include a 30-day money-back guarantee.
